evidence_summary: Establish the emotional weight of the journey through a character backstory reveal. The sequence transitions from physical labor and rhythmic movement to a heavy, tragic monologue as the Tin Woodman recounts his transformation.
As they travel along the Yellow Brick Road, the Woodman uses his axe to clear the path. He recounts how he was once a human wood-chopper who was transformed into tin by the Wicked Witch of the East.
Rhythmic movement through thick branches and debris.
Heavy silence following a tragic revelation.
The Tin Woodman clears the path with an axe while recounting his past.
